Localization.Description: A user assigned a role for an organization to a user group or account or revoked it from a user group or account

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} assigned role {object.value} for organization "{datafield2}" to owner "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} revoked role {object.value} for organization "{datafield2}" from owner "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
